channel.title: LLM Timeline — Apple Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from Apple.

item.title: SimpleFold (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: DiffuCoder (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: DiffuCoder License: open Type: model "We adapt our model from Qwen2.5-Coder (Hui et al., 2024) as the base model to perform continual pre-training using the adaptation approach from Gong et al. (2025). During this pre-training, we use a 400B-token code pre-training corpus from RefineCode (Huang et al., 2024) and Stackv2 (Lozhkov et al., 2024)."

item.title: AFM-on-device (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 2.7B License: closed Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: AFM-server (Apple)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: DCLM 7B (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: 4M-21 (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 4M-21 License: open Type: model Vision model based on T5-XXL. Modalities: RGB, Caption, Bounding boxes, Semantic segmentation, Depth, Human poses, Surface normals, CLIP, DINOv2, ImageBind, Metadata, Canny edges, SAM edges, SAM instances, Color palette. Project page: https://4m.epfl.ch/

item.title: Apple On-Device model Jun/2024 (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: Apple On-Device model Jun/2024 License: open Type: model https://lifearchitect.ai/apple/ Likely to be the Apple OpenELM model (Apr/2024). "two of these models — a ~3 billion parameter on-device language model, and a larger server-based language model available with Private Cloud Compute". https://machinelearning.apple.com/research/introducing-apple-foundation-models The server-based model is possibly Ferret, although it is more properly called a multimodal model (not just language). It could also be Apple GPT based on their Ajax framework: https://archive.md/f3C0r

item.title: OpenELM-1.1B (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 1.1B License: open Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: OpenELM-3B (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3.0B License: open Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: OpenELM-450M (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 450M License: open Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: OpenELM-270M (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 270M License: open Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: OpenELM (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: OpenELM License: open Type: model On-device model (laptop, phone). Open-source Efficient Language Models (OpenELM). https://venturebeat.com/ai/apple-releases-openelm-small-open-source-ai-models-designed-to-run-on-device/

item.title: Ferret-UI (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: Ferret-UI License: open Type: model Vicuna base, multimodal. Extension of Ferret from Oct/2023.

item.title: MobileCLIP-B (LT) (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 149.7M License: open Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: ReALM (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: closed Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: MM1-30B (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: 30B License: closed Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: ReALM-3B (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: ReALM-3B License: closed Type: model FLAN-T5 (Oct/2022) finetune.

item.title: MM1 (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: MM1 License: closed Type: model VLM, outperforms Flamingo 80B (Apr/2022) across benchmarks. 2T text tokens + ~10B+ other text (estimate). Unreleased.

item.title: Ask (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: Ask License: closed Type: model Internal employee model only

item.title: MGIE (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: MGIE License: open Type: model MLLM and diffusion model initialized from LLaVA-7B (Llama 2 + Vicuna) + StableDiffusion-v1.5.

item.title: Ferret (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: Ferret License: open Type: model Vicuna base, multimodal

item.title: Mobile V-MoEs (Apple)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by Apple

item.title: UniLM (Apple)
item.description: Parameters: UniLM License: open Type: model Apple's Transformer model for iOS 17 + macOS Sonoma. Announce is actually Jun/2023. GPT-2 base? 128 token context window
